prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 1942→2269→1846→2209→2498，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 650 名；2025 年基准约 2498 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2024 年均为 107 人左右，2025 年 104 人，2026 年计划 102 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 1.9%，对竞争影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 21 名，近年排名稳定在 20–23 名区间，属国内顶尖高校行列；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及生科院院长论文数据造假、多名教师被实名举报等学术不端事件，可能对考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第 36 位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；化学 A+、工商管理 A+、应用经济学 A+、数学 A+、统计学 A、物理学 A 等 14 个学科获评 A- 及以上，学科实力雄厚；理科试验班（数学与大数据）、工科试验班（信息科学与技术）等招生大类对应优势学科，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年山西省物理类考生 167,419 人，较 2025 年 173,347 人减少约 3.4%，竞争略趋缓和；南开大学位于天津，与山西相邻，交通便利，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在山西招生规模较大（ 物理类 100 人以上），属该校在北方省份的重点生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招、本省物理类考生数减少以及声誉负面事件对报考热度的潜在抑制，在 2025 年基准 2498 名基础上预计竞争略有缓和；预测最低位次约 2489 名，区间 2205–2773 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（包含物理学、量子信息科学、化学、生物科学）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（包含计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）（包含计算机科学与技术、物联网工程、信息安全、自动化、智能科学与技术、软件工程）
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）
- 理科试验班（数智经济金融）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（物质科学）（包含化学、应用化学、生物科学、材料物理、材料化学）
- 工科试验班（未来产业精英）（包含智能医学工程、新能源科学与工程等特色班）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 2205–2773 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档伯苓班和数学/大数据等王牌专业冲刺、三档物质科学和未来产业精英等专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（2205 名以内）可重点冲击一档伯苓班和数学与大数据试验班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 1942→2269→1846→2209→2498, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 650 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2498th place; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was around 107 people each year from 2021 to 2024, 104 people in 2025, and 102 people planned for 2026, a slight reduction of about 1.9% compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents such as data fabrication in a paper by the dean of the School of Life Sciences and multiple teachers being reported by name, which may suppress candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking 36th (relatively hot), short video exposure is moderately high; Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, and 14 other disciplines rated A- or above, with strong disciplinary strength; enrollment categories such as Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there are 167,419 physics category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, making competition slightly less intense; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Shanxi, with convenient transportation, strongly attracting Shanxi candidates; the university has a large enrollment scale in Shanxi (over 100 in physics category), making it a key source of students in northern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking backward trend, slight enrollment reduction in 2026, decrease in provincial physics category candidates, and potential suppression of application popularity due to negative reputation events, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 2498th place; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2489th, with a range of 2205–2773.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (includes Physics, Quantum Information Science, Chemistry, Biological Science)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (includes Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (includes Computer Science and Technology, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Digital Intelligence Economy and Finance)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science) (includes Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Science, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Industry Elite) (includes Intelligent Medical Engineering, New Energy Science and Engineering and other special classes)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 2205–2773, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 Boling classes and Mathematics/Big Data and other top majors, and use Tier 3 Material Science and Future Industry Elite majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2205), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Boling classes and Mathematics and Big Data Experimental Class.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 21 名，属国内顶尖高校；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为明显负面，学术不端事件可能抑制部分考生报考热情；抖音热度排名第 36 位（较热）；工商管理 A+、应用经济学 A+、中国语言文学 A、世界史 A、中国史 A、马克思主义理论 A 等，文科优势学科实力突出，对文科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年山西省历史类考生 63,113 人，较 2025 年 84,879 人减少约 25.6%，竞争大幅缓和；南开大学位于天津，与山西相邻，交通便利，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2026 年计划大幅缩招 29.1%（推高位次前移）与本省历史类考生数大幅减少 25.6%（推高位次后移）两股力量对冲，加之声誉负面事件对报考热度的潜在抑制，在 2025 年基准 274 名基础上预计竞争略趋缓和；预测最低位次约 241 名，区间 191–291 名。

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 255→280→308→259→274, fluctuating narrowly within the 255–308 range, with a 2025 baseline of about 274. The 2026 plan is 39, a significant reduction of about 29.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 21st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, belonging to top domestic universities. Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Marxist Theory A, etc., with outstanding advantages in liberal arts disciplines, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region

Nankai University is located in Tianjin, adjacent to Shanxi, with convenient transportation, exerting strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the two opposing forces of a significant 29.1% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (pushing rankings forward) and a substantial 25.6% decrease in the number of provincial history category candidates (pushing rankings backward), along with the potential suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation events, competition is expected to slightly ease based on the 2025 baseline of 274. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 241, with a range of 191–291.
